calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-295 cascade Tier-1 retest under GAP-4 operating substrate (goal_pipeline:GAP-4)
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-4 owner EXQ. StepHarness + drive_floor=0.9 + goal_stream (MECH-307/295). 2 arms: legacy collapsed vs gap4 operating. Tier-1 C1-C4 on gap4 arm (cue_fires, dacc_bias, approach_commit, goal_active) + lift vs legacy. validate_experiments + dry-run OK.

items.title: EXQ-471 catatonic-lock Tier-1 retest under GAP-4 substrate
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-4 Tier-1 cohort. Same 2-arm legacy vs gap4 design as 490g on fishtank env; Q-040 catatonic-lock factorial under corrected harness.

items.title: SD-036 GABAergic decay Tier-1 retest under GAP-4 substrate
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-4 Tier-1. Both arms use gap4 stack; factorial is gabaergic decay OFF vs ON (+pag on gaba arm). Supersedes pre-harness EXQ-475 read.

items.title: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm factorial under GAP-4 substrate
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-4 Tier-1. 4-arm gaba x broadcast factorial; all arms gap4 operating. Tier-1 gate ON_ON vs OFF_OFF then SD-037-specific reads.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation under GAP-2 substrate (goal_pipeline:GAP-2)
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-2 owner. 514f reef P0/P1/P2 + MECH-307 conjunction + drive_floor=0.9 + SP-CEM defaults on ARM_1/2/3. PASS: 514f C0-C3b + goal_resource_r>=0.5 + lift>=0.4 + wl_dissoc>=0.6. Runs after 588b recommended. validate + dry-run OK.

items.title: Goal-seeding pipeline diagnostic: drive_floor x transient patches (post EXQ-588 autopsy)
items.note: Diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 3 arms: ARM_OFF (floor=0, no patch), ARM_FLOOR (0.9, no patch), ARM_FLOOR_PATCH (0.9 + transient benefit 3.0). Persistent agent, 300 ep x 200 steps, post-warmup=ep50. A1 OFF zero seedings; A2 floor >=2/3 seeds seeding; A3 floor+patch >=2/3; A4 patch contacts >1.1x floor. Routes failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-588. Smoke PASS; validate_experiments OK.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-004 rerun: novelty bonus Goldilocks calibration with checkpoint/resume
items.note: Recovery rerun for V3-EXQ-590 after stdout-only false PASS with output_file="" and no evidence manifest. Same pre-registered design: novelty_bonus_weight in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0], 3 seeds, 1000 episodes, 200 steps. Script now writes a per-arm/seed checkpoint under REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/_partial so a future interruption can resume from completed seed metrics.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008.

items.title: GAP-11 pilot: committed-mode curriculum harness validation (EXP-0157)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-4 gate (GAP-11 pilot). Priority 3 / DLAPTOP-4.local. 3 arms: EMERGENT (P0 warmup -> P2 eval), FORCED_RV, STARVED. C1-C3 per script. PASS unblocks /queue-experiment Phase 4/5 cohort 460b/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b. Supersedes V3-EXQ-461 (synthetic scripted diagnostic, 2026-05-12).

items.title: Post-SP-CEM three-arm ARC-033 vs ARC-058 harm-trunk arbitration (self_attribution:GAP-1)
items.note: self_attribution:GAP-1 evidence. OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT (ARC-033) vs ON_SHARED (ARC-058); main-path SP-CEM defaults (ARC-065). PASS requires C0 policy entropy>=0.10, C1 balanced agent/body harm tags in P2, C2 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 both ON arms, C3 cross-arm r2 discrimination (not bit-identical). Supersedes inconclusive 445/445b monostrategy reads and two-arm 445h. validate_experiments OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 (criteria FAIL on tiny run expected).

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B mode-separation floor falsifier (post-543i substrate)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B retest. Substrate: mode_separation_floor=0.25 + p1_w_deviation_aux=0.1 on gated arms (543i autopsy: w~0.5 cancels differential in composed bias). K_IDENTICAL_RUNS=3 per (arm,seed) basin-stability gate; hostname in manifest. Same 12-arm 543i design. PASS = diff_on_escape AND diff_off_reproduced_collapse (all-K strict) AND c2c3_on_pass AND basin_stable. Smoke + validate OK.

items.title: commitment_closure GAP-1: SD-033a bias-head frozen vs trainable ablation
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-1 validation. 2 arms: lateral_pfc_train_rule_bias_head OFF vs ON on ARC-062+SD-054 stack (SP-CEM, differential heads, mode_separation_floor). C1 frozen bias silent; C2 trainable non-zero score_bias; C3 trainable reef_frac in (0.2,0.8). Scientific gate: interpret after V3-EXQ-543k contributory PASS. Priority 4 (runs after 543k at 5). validate + dry-run OK.
